scripts.test:geometry: tsc tests/chess-geometry.test.ts src/chess.ts --outDir /tmp/pct-web-geometry --module commonjs --moduleResolution node --target ES2022 --skipLibCheck && node /tmp/pct-web-geometry/tests/chess-geometry.test.js
scripts.test:review: tsc tests/review-state.test.ts src/review.ts src/types.ts --outDir /tmp/pct-web-review --module commonjs --moduleResolution node --target ES2022 --skipLibCheck && node /tmp/pct-web-review/tests/review-state.test.js
scripts.test: npm run test:geometry && npm run test:review
